aboutPage.title: About us
aboutPage.subtitle: FreelanceKG is a local platform for safe collaboration between clients and freelancers in Kyrgyzstan

history.title: Platform history
history.text: FreelanceKG started as a local initiative to simplify hiring and make deals transparent.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.text: We build a secure ecosystem with escrow mechanics where both sides are protected by clear rules.

team.title: Team
team.text: The product is developed by engineers, designers and support specialists with marketplace and fintech experience.

aboutPage.whatsNextText1: We are growing FreelanceKG into a complete platform: transparent payments, clear moderation and strong community.
aboutPage.whatsNextText2: Our goal is to make freelance collaboration in the region as safe and convenient as in global services.

steps.findText: Choose category, compare profiles and rates, then create an order with clear scope.
steps.escrowText: Budget is reserved on the platform. Freelancer sees the order is financially confirmed.
steps.doneText: After checking the result, you approve work and funds are transferred to freelancer.

helpPage.subtitle: Frequently asked questions and support channels

knowledge.text: Answers to common questions about orders, payments, disputes and security.

support.title: Support
support.text: Support team helps with dispute cases and financial operations.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.text: Reach us via feedback form and get response by email.

faqPage.subtitle: Answers to frequent FreelanceKG user questions

escrow.question: How does escrow work on FreelanceKG?
escrow.answer: Client transfers budget to escrow. Funds are held on platform until result approval. After approval payment is automatically released to freelancer.

select.question: How to choose a reliable freelancer?
select.answer: Check rating, completed orders, reviews, portfolio and response time. You can also start with a small test task.

quality.question: What if work quality is poor?
quality.answer: Open a dispute on order page and attach evidence. Platform team reviews the case and usually makes decision within 48 hours.

fees.question: What are platform fees?
fees.answer: Order creation is free for clients. Freelancers pay a service fee from successfully completed orders.

remote.question: Can I work fully remotely?
remote.answer: Yes. All steps, including communication, approvals, file transfer and closing deals, are available online.

support.question: How fast does support respond?
support.answer: Average first response is up to 30 minutes during working hours and up to 2 hours at night.

contactPage.title: Contacts
contactPage.subtitle: Get in touch with FreelanceKG team
contactPage.sent: Message sent. We will contact you shortly.

general.title: 1. General provisions
general.text: FreelanceKG provides a platform for clients and freelancers to collaborate. By using service, you agree with these terms.

account.title: 2. Registration and account
account.text: User must provide accurate information during registration and must not share account access with third parties.

orders.title: 3. Orders and payments
orders.text: The platform provides informational and coordination services. The "escrow" mechanism is a security payment to ensure obligations and is not a bank deposit or custody service.

disputes.title: 4. Disputes
disputes.text: In conflicts, parties must provide materials and correspondence. Platform may decide based on available data.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of liability
liability.text: The platform is not a bank, payment institution, or profit guarantor. Platform is not responsible for indirect losses and does not guarantee commercial outcome for any order.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Feed of events for orders, payments and security.
notifications.policyText: Critical security notifications are always sent even if some channels are disabled.
notifications.policyHint: Critical notifications cannot be fully disabled
